channel.title: eu-tech-jobs — new EU AI/tech jobs (daily)
channel.description: New jobs added to the eu-tech-jobs daily snapshot. Open-data; CC BY 4.0.

item.title: (Senior) Product Designer (m/f/d) — 1komma5grad
item.description:
1komma5grad · Berlin ## 1KOMMA5° At 1KOMMA5°, we pursue a clear vision: Living on wind and sunlight forever for free. To make this a reality, we are building the energy system of the future with Heartbeat AI. Want to be part of it?

We bring together regional craftsmanship and scalable software: We don't think of solar, batteries, heat pumps, and e-mobility as isolated components, but control them as an intelligent, integrated overall system in our virtual power plant. Direct

item.title: INTERNAL - Executive Assistant - (all genders) — mbition
item.description:
mbition · Berlin ## Your Mission As Executive Assistant, you will play a vital role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of daily operations. In this position, you will manage a broad range of administrative and organizational responsibilities, acting as a trusted partner and key point of coordination within the department and across teams. ## Sneak preview of your future tasks
  • Managing the Head of Department’s calendar, prioritizing appointments, and ensuring an organized and efficient sc

item.title: INTERNAL Application Domain Function Owner (all genders) — mbition
item.description: mbition · Berlin ## Your Mission The Function Owner (FO) oversees the vehicle system functionality applicable to multiple system generations and multiple vehicle programs. This responsibility includes the management of e. g. OEM-specific requirements, ECU-external interfaces to other car parts or vehicle systems, dependencies between vehicle programs and coordination across onboard and offboard software systems. The Function Owner will support the development and implementation of specific functions within a ve

item.title: INTERNAL Test Environment Maintenance Engineer (all genders) – Berlin — mbition
item.description:
mbition · Berlin ## Your Mission As a Test Environment Maintenance Engineer, you will be responsible for setting up, operating, and stabilizing complex automotive test environments across three domains. The role focuses on ECU preparation, flashing, system bring-up, and low-level troubleshooting in both bench and vehicle environments.
 In addition, you will actively support domain test drives and vehicle-based validation activities, requiring a valid driving license (Mercedes Benz F2 equivalent) and hands-on

item.title: Digital Verification Engineer — qblox
item.description: qblox · Delft, Netherlands At Qblox, we are orchestrating the "brain" of the quantum computer. Our distributed control stacks allow for parallel qubit readout and nanosecond-level synchronization across massive architectures. Imagine the complexity of all-to-all connectivity for 1000 qubits, interacting with physical hardware via high-frequency analogue signals—that is the scale of the challenge our verification team faces. As we expand our R&D capabilities, we are looking for a **Digital Verification Engineer** to ensur

item.title: Scaled Customer Success Manager - French Speaker — notion
Head of Office Management — mayflower
item.description: mayflower · Limassol, Cyprus Mayflower is a technology company that alters the entertainment industry to a new level of perception and engagement. We are building the future of live entertainment. We believe that by providing people with the best and high-quality live streaming experience in entertainment, we can tackle the world’s “problems” better, together! We are looking for a Head of Office Management who will join our team in Limassol office. #### **Job Responsibilities** * Develop and lead the workplace strategy

item.title: L5 Senior Security Operations Centre Specialist — deliveroo
L4 Security Operations Centre Specialist — deliveroo
L5 Lead Security Operations Centre Specialist — deliveroo
Senior Technical Writer / Developer Educator — mistral
Applied Scientist / Research Engineer, AI for Physics - EMEA — mistral
Founder in Residence, Open Application for Founders — mistral

Retail Development Manager — wolt
item.description:
wolt · Warsaw, Poland

About Wolt

At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the gl

item.title: Account Development Representative, Arabic Speaking — mongodb
item.description:
mongodb · Dublin

MongoDB’s mission is to empower innovators to create, transform, and disrupt industries by unleashing the power of software and data. We enable organizations of all sizes to easily build, scale, and run modern applications by helping them modernize legacy workloads, embrace innovation, and unleash AI. Our industry-leading developer data platform, MongoDB Atlas, is the only globally distributed, multi-cloud database and is available in more than 115 regions across AWS, Google Cloud, and Micros

item.title: Logistics Handler — axon
item.description:
axon · Kassel, Hesse, Germany

Join Axon and be a Force for Good.

At Axon, we’re on a mission to Protect Life. We’re explorers, pursuing society’s most critical safety and justice issues with our ecosystem of devices and cloud software. Like our products, we work better together. We connect with candor and care, seeking out diverse perspectives from our customers, communities and each other.

Life at Axon is fast-paced, challenging and meaningful. Here, you’ll take

item.title: Solutions Engineer (Hong Kong) — oxylabs
item.description: oxylabs · Hong Kong Oxylabs is a market-leading proxy and web scraping solution provider driven by a mission to build a highly reliable, scalable, and low-cost cloud infrastructure platform for public web data gathering. We’re a team of 500+ professionals who develop cutting-edge web data-gathering solutions for thousands of the world’s best-known businesses, including Fortune 500 companies. Our vision is to create a future where big data is accessible to all businesses of different sizes around the globe. **What’

item.title: Materials science intern — patsnap
item.description: patsnap · Singapore We are seeking a detail-oriented candidate to structure and curate semiconductor process knowledge. You will translate complex technical content into standardised insights and collaborate cross-functionally to enhance data quality. ## Key Responsibilities: - Distill and author standardized Process Skills from annotated data and patent texts, covering process objectives, flow steps, key parameters, control points, common defects, alternative solutions, and evolution paths. - Participate in buil

Intern Investment & Pension Products (m/f/d) — raisin
item.description:
raisin · Berlin, Berlin, Germany

Raisin is the world's leading platform for savings and investment products. Founded in 2012, the FinTech connects consumers with banks in the EU, the UK and the US. This gives consumers better interest rates and banks a diversified form of refinancing. Our vision is to offer savings and investments without barriers and thus open up the glo
